languages.text: "Пускай Теодора и была осквернена якшанием с Хаосом — я исправлю ее ошибки".

traits.locale_text: Теодора была хаоситкой, я все исправлю
"Пускай Теодора и была осквернена якшанием с Хаосом — я исправлю ее ошибки".

languages.text: "Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."
languages.original_text: "Пускай Теодора и была осквернена якшанием с Хаосом — я исправлю ее ошибки".

traits.locale_text: "Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."
"Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."
"Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."
"Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."
"Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."

languages.text: "Theodora mag sich selbst befleckt haben, indem sie mit dem Chaos verkehrte, aber ich werde ihre Fehler korrigieren."
languages.original_text: "Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."

traits.locale_text: "Theodora mag sich selbst befleckt haben, indem sie mit dem Chaos verkehrte, aber ich werde ihre Fehler korrigieren."

languages.text: "Théodora s'est peut-être souillée en fréquentant le Chaos, mais je corrigerai ses erreurs.
languages.original_text: "Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."

traits.locale_text: "Théodora s'est peut-être souillée en fréquentant le Chaos, mais je corrigerai ses erreurs.

languages.text: "Puede que Theodora se haya manchado al asociarse con el Caos, pero yo corregiré sus errores".
languages.original_text: "Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."

traits.locale_text: "Puede que Theodora se haya manchado al asociarse con el Caos, pero yo corregiré sus errores".

languages.text: "Theodora Kaos'la işbirliği yaparak kendini lekelemiş olabilir ama ben onun hatalarını düzelteceğim."
languages.original_text: "Theodora may have tainted herself by consorting with Chaos, but I will correct her mistakes."

traits.locale_text: "Theodora Kaos'la işbirliği yaparak kendini lekelemiş olabilir ama ben onun hatalarını düzelteceğim."
